title: No dedicated test for missing-author validation
evidence: tests/api.rs:69 — create_missing_title_fails tests missing title only; no equivalent for missing author. Validation code at src/lib.rs:91-93 handles both.
suggestion: Add a create_missing_author_fails test for completeness

title: No test for GET /books/{id} with non-existent id returning 404
evidence: tests/api.rs — update_and_delete checks 404 after deletion (line 170) but no test for a never-created id. Handler at src/lib.rs:166 returns NOT_FOUND.

title: retort.db inaccessible — scores derived from fallback cargo test
evidence: sqlite3 -readonly experiment-1/retort.db returned error 14 (unable to open). Fallback: cargo test ran 5/5 passed in 12.45s.
suggestion: Re-run retort scoring to populate DB rows for this run
